name: Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition
description: The product checks the state of a resource before using it, but the resource's state can change between the check and the use in a way that invalidates the results of the check, allowing attackers to manipulate resources after validation but before use.
detection_pattern: CONTROL node checks resource state then separate TRANSFORM or STORAGE node uses that resource, with a time gap between check and use that allows external modification
